localTips: Visit popular attractions early in the morning to avoid the largest crowds.
Avoid eating directly next to major landmarks because prices are usually higher.
Trastevere is useful for evening walks and local food.
foodTips: Try carbonara, cacio e pepe, supplì, and maritozzo.
Look for small trattorias a few streets away from the main tourist routes.
avoid: Restaurants with aggressive street promoters near tourist landmarks.
Overloading one day with Vatican, Colosseum, and central Rome together.
transportTips: Group nearby attractions together to reduce unnecessary transit time.
Use public transport or walking for central areas instead of taxis during peak hours.
budgetTips: Use free viewpoints and churches to balance paid attractions.
Reserve budget for food experiences instead of only major paid attractions.
